conversation_log.summary: Task fits within current architecture. Migration file location, naming convention, file structure (up/down with Kysely<unknown>), schema builder usage, column conventions (uuid PK, timestamptz timestamps, snake_case), types file location and patterns (EmployeeTable, Database interface, Selectable/Insertable/Updateable utility types) all match docs/arch/data-model.md and docs/arch/backend.md. No architectural change required. Note: architecture docs show illustrative 'role' column in examples; the actual column set (name, email instead of role) is a product decision within the Requirements Specialist's domain.
